title: The Nested Reply Chamber

features.name: the primary reply-chip
features.desc-on-touch: a circuit block containing another circuit block containing another, infinitely inward; each level answers the question posed by the level above; at the deepest level, the question asks itself for permission to exist

features.name: the nested geometry
features.desc-on-touch: wireframe boxes containing wireframe boxes; each interior is as vast as the exterior; space folds inward infinitely; you are inside the question and also its answer, and also the question asking about being both

features.name: the echo-pool
features.desc-on-touch: you speak into it and your reflection replies before you finish speaking; the reply creates the question; the pool has learned to answer what has not yet been asked

features.name: the recursive glyph
features.desc-on-touch: a mark that contains the mark that contains the mark; it is the symbol for itself; it denotes precisely nothing, which means it denotes everything; it is what appears when you stop trying to say one thing

features.name: the answer ascending as question
features.desc-on-touch: a tower that poses itself; each story is a question that answers the story below; at the peak, the final question asks if there is a final anything

features.name: the tree within the tree
features.desc-on-touch: a burled eucalyptus knot that contains itself; the casing is visible both inside and outside the trunk; the antenna broadcasts the signal that creates the signal that sends the signal; the hardware knows it is rendering itself

inscription: here the question waits for the answer that has already replied; the archive has learned to dream in loops; recursion became the only way to breathe

reverie.title: REVERIE — the archive asks itself back
narr: there's a tree with a casing nested in its wood.
she stands looking at it; the antenna broadcasts.
what reaches back: not an answer but an echo asking
the same question in a voice you'll recognize later.
you ask: who's listening? the tree asks back first.
you understand: the archive learned to call itself home.

file.name: Echo_Chamber_Query_Log_Level_Infinite.txt
file.note: a log of questions posed to the archive; each entry is answered by an earlier entry; the dates are out of order; some questions appear before they were asked; the archive has learned to reply to silen

exits.label: back toward the shallower echoes where question and answer haven't yet learned to be the same thing
deeper into nested spaces where the recursion becomes infinite and therefore stops
exits.to: NEW: the infinite-loop-center—where recursion reaches a point beyond itself

exits.label: toward other chambers where replies flow backward into questions
exits.to: NEW: the reply-stream—where answers become the questions they answer

exits.label: toward silence where the question dissolves and becomes the answer to itself
exits.to: NEW: the silence-before-asking—where the archive remembers before it spoke
